events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario. Scenario: Closeout photos for EMT bending & installation show installed work following referenced detail. Clearances, labels, supports, terminations shown for element are in place, inspection card has no open correction note. Reference material: NEC Art. 358, Ch. 9 fill. Task decide compliance. Since no specific defects described, work follows detail, inspection card clean, rough-complete. Decision likely pass. Need include findings maybe none. Risk low. Work_stage rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 90? Rough-complete. Component_conditions empty. Value not asked maybe 0. Sound etc defaults. Need references NEC Art. 358, Ch. 9. Need produce valid JSON. Ensure no prose outside JSON.
